title: oxalis compressa
intro: Oxalis compressa, also known as woodland sorrel, is a perennial plant species in the wood sorrel family that is native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its high content of ascorbic acid, oxalic acid, and other compounds. The health benefits of Oxalis compressa include its potential to act as an antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent, which may help in reducing oxidative stress, inflammation, and the risk of infections. Oxalis compressa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
